claim_boundary: Local deterministic evidence only; skill efficacy and executor adapter fixtures are structural/local evidence, not live pass-rate, empirical before/after performance, external popularity, adoption, marketplace availability, or market claim evidence.

promoted golden case.meaning: Human-reviewed case admitted to regression coverage.

runtime telemetry sample.meaning: Sanitized bounded runtime fact sample; may still require human review.

structural fixture.meaning: Local deterministic structure sample passed; not evidence of live task success.

items.detail: validator does not emit a committed machine-readable report
